text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is a momentous race in which
only the most popular and meritorious
Umamusume can compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd cheers exuberantly, eager to see an
unexpectedly familiar lineup of racers compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Golden Generation are all here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo lets out a sigh and confidently
diminishes her competitors as her "backup
dancers" for today's grand event.
